{ "private": true, "type": "module", "engines": { "node": ">=22.19.0" }, "scripts": { "dev": "vite", "build": "vite build", "watch": "vite build --watch" }, "dependencies": { "alpinejs": "^3.14.9", "shiki": "^3.13.0", "tailwindcss": "^4.1.12", "tippy.js": "^6.3.7", "tw-animate-css": "^1.3.7" }, "devDependencies": { "@tailwindcss/vite": "^4.1.12", "vite": "^7.1.11" } }
